ddls:
CREATE TABLE "upload_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the upload component */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the component */,
  "header" TEXT /* Header text for the upload component */,
  "title" TEXT /* Text displayed on the upload button */,
  "accept" TEXT /* Accepted file types for the upload */,
  "path" TEXT /* S3 path where files will be stored */,
  "default_name" TEXT /* Default name for files when uploaded */,
  "max_file_size" INTEGER /* Maximum file size allowed for upload */,
  "allowed_extensions" TEXT /* Allowed file extensions for upload */,
  "privacy_policy" TEXT /* Reference to the client's data privacy policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the component is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upload_components_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Client's website */,
  "data_privacy_policy" TEXT /* Client's data privacy policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the client account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_preview" (
  "preview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component preview */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the upload component being previewed */,
  "preview_settings" TEXT /* Settings used for the component preview */,
  "last_previewed" TEXT /* Date when the component was last previewed */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* URL where the component can be previewed */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the preview settings are the default settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_preview_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES upload_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the upload component being deployed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client receiving the component */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployment_url" TEXT /* URL where the component is deployed */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator who deployed the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES upload_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file upload log */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the upload component used for the upload */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the upload failed */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the file */,
  "bucket_name" TEXT /* S3 bucket name where the file is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES upload_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the administrator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the administrator account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative activity */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., configure, deploy, update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_activities_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES administrators ("role")
)
